data.name: g:idempotency_key_reused
data.value: Same idempotency key reused with a different request body.

data.name: g:idempotency_in_flight
data.value: An identical request with this idempotency key is still being processed. Retry after a short backoff.

data.name: g:idempotency_in_flight_timeout
data.value: Timed out waiting for an in-flight request with this idempotency key to complete.

data.name: g:idempotency_body_too_large
data.value: Request body exceeds the configured limit for idempotency processing.

data.name: g:idempotency_key_malformed
data.value: Idempotency-Key header is malformed (length over 255, contains control characters, or multi-valued).
